_meta.source: CBS Netherlands — Arbeidsrekeningen 2022 + Eurostat SES 2022 Netherlands
_meta.methodology: Netherlands earnings data from Eurostat SES 2022, cross-referenced with CBS (Statistics Netherlands) labour accounts. Covers gross annual earnings by ISCO-08 occupation for enterprises 10+ employees. Amsterdam city-level derived from CBS regional data — Amsterdam is approximately 7–10% above national median for tech roles due to concentration of tech firms and international employer base. Updated to 2024 via CBS Netherlands labour accounts nominal wage index (+13.2% cumulative 2022-2024).
_meta.coverage: Netherlands national and Amsterdam city-level. Strong signal for software engineering, data, and professional services roles. Netherlands has one of the higher tech salary levels in continental Europe.
_meta.limitations: ISCO-08 codes are broad. CBS regional data provides Amsterdam premium estimate — not a direct city-level ISCO breakdown. Self-employed and small firms excluded.
_meta.currency_note: All figures in EUR gross annual.

records._ref: Eurostat SES 2024, ISCO 2512 Software developers — Netherlands national, junior
records.notes: Netherlands junior software developers. P25 earnings band from SES 2024. NL has competitive entry-level salaries vs EU peers.

records._ref: Eurostat SES 2024, ISCO 2512 Software developers — Netherlands national, mid
records.notes: Netherlands software developers from SES 2024. Strong tech sector with above-EU-average pay. Amsterdam premium over national average is modest (5–10% for tech roles).

records._ref: Eurostat SES 2024, ISCO 2512 Software developers — Netherlands national, senior
records.notes: Senior software developers Netherlands. Upper quartile. International tech companies (ASML, Booking.com, Adyen, TomTom) push upper end.

records._ref: CBS regional + Eurostat SES 2024 — Software developers, Amsterdam city, mid
records.notes: Amsterdam mid-level software developers. ~9% premium over national median based on CBS regional earnings differential. International tech employer concentration (Booking.com, Adyen, TomTom, Uber EU HQ) inflates top end.

records._ref: Eurostat SES 2024, ISCO 1221 — Product Manager proxy, Netherlands national
records.notes: ISCO 1221 digital/tech management — closest Eurostat mapping to product manager for Netherlands. Includes tech sector management at Booking.com, Adyen, TomTom.

records._ref: Eurostat SES 2024, ISCO 2529 — Data analyst, Netherlands national
records.notes: Data analyst / database professionals Netherlands. Strong data science market, particularly in fintech and e-commerce. Maps to data-analyst and data-scientist.

records._ref: Eurostat SES 2024, ISCO 2431 — Marketing professionals, Netherlands national
records.notes: Marketing professionals Netherlands. ISCO 2431. Amsterdam has a high density of digital marketing roles (Booking.com, TikTok EU, etc.). Maps to marketing-manager, performance-marketing-manager, growth-manager.
